calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Feb-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel for Petitioner.

The matter was continued to February 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Wenzel to file the Franchise Tax Board statement and a declaration with regard to such. The Court directed Ms. Wenzel to contact Mr. Kneis (Probate Examiner) with regard to appropriate findings in the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

Petition For Waiver Of Appraisal By Probate Referee
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel for Jilla Roth.

The Court stated that it received the Receipt of Payment of Creditor's Claim of Wells Fargo, that it was sufficient to waive notice to them, that there were a variety of items in the Estate and that the local rule does not allow waiver of an appraisal by the Probate Referee. Ms. Wenzel presented oral argument to support her position. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court denied the petition. Ms. Wenzel is to prepare the order. Status of filing of the Inventory and Appraisal was set for October 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
